commands.review_summary:
The PR adds terminal-session lifecycle guards and regression tests across CLI session resolution, auto-reply session initialization, and restart-sentinel continuation routing.

PR surface: Source +34, Tests +132. Total +166 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main computes freshness without terminal status and enqueues restart continuations without an endedAt/status guard. The linked issue supplies Telegram logs, but I did not run a live Telegram reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed for the restart-continuation policy choice and the remaining live gateway/Telegram proof gap; there is no narrow automated code repair to queue from this review.
